goal_instruction: You are on the Stonebridge City portal. Reach the Expedited Permit Renewal Supporting Documents Upload page.

city_home.title: Stonebridge City Services
city_home.text: Stonebridge City supports permits, inspections, business services, and resident requests.

links.label: Permits and Licensing
links.preview_text: Permit applications, renewals, inspections, and licensing support.

links.label: Business Services
links.preview_text: Business registration, tax forms, and commerce resources.

permits_center.title: Permits and Licensing
permits_center.text: Permits and Licensing includes new permit applications, permit renewals, inspections, and contractor records.

links.label: Renewal Requests
links.preview_text: Renew active permits, submit supporting documents, and review status.

renewal_requests.title: Renewal Requests
renewal_requests.text: Renewal Requests covers standard permit renewals, expedited renewals, and documentation submission steps.

links.label: Expedited Renewal
links.preview_text: Fast-track renewal processing and supporting document requirements.

links.label: Renewal Status Lookup
links.preview_text: Check the status of a submitted permit renewal.

expedited_renewal.title: Expedited Renewal
expedited_renewal.text: Expedited Renewal includes urgent renewal rules, supporting document upload, and exception handling for expiring permits.

links.label: Supporting Documents Upload
links.preview_text: Upload the supporting files required for an expedited permit renewal.

links.label: Expedited Renewal Checklist
links.preview_text: Checklist for fees, supporting forms, and permit details.

new_permit_applications.title: New Permit Applications
new_permit_applications.text: Start a new building, event, or contractor permit application.

inspection_scheduling.title: Inspection Scheduling
inspection_scheduling.text: Book inspections and review inspection requirements for active permits.

standard_renewal.title: Standard Renewal
standard_renewal.text: Routine permit renewal workflow for permits that are not time-sensitive.

renewal_status_lookup.title: Renewal Status Lookup
renewal_status_lookup.text: Look up the current processing state of a submitted permit renewal.

business_services.title: Business Services
business_services.text: Business services covers registration, tax forms, and licensing help.

resident_help.title: Resident Help
resident_help.text: General city help, service routing, and contact guidance.

links.label: City Services Home
links.preview_text: Back to the city services landing page.

expedited_renewal_checklist.title: Expedited Renewal Checklist
expedited_renewal_checklist.text: Checklist for permit number, expiring date, and supporting document requirements.

expedited_permit_renewal_supporting_docu.title: Expedited Permit Renewal Supporting Documents Upload
expedited_permit_renewal_supporting_docu.text: This page contains the upload flow for supporting documents required in an expedited permit renewal.
